name: Theacrine
summary: Theacrine is a purine alkaloid related to caffeine with limited short-term human evidence for energy and mood effects. Evidence remains small-study and supplement-context only.
description: Theacrine is a caffeine-like purine alkaloid that may alter arousal and energy via adenosine and dopamine pathways; human data remain limited.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
